description_long: This is a two-story stone house surrounded by a white picket fence and lush landscaping, including several large trees and flowering bushes. The house features a flat roof with visible rooftop structures, possibly skylights or HVAC units. The front facade is adorned with a central arched doorway framed by climbing ivy and flanked by symmetrical windows. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a small gabled extension, likely a side entrance or utility room. The property is bordered by a winding stone path leading from the front gate to the main entrance, and the garden is well-maintained with a mix of green and purple foliage. The overall appearance suggests a blend of traditional and modern elements, with a focus on natural materials and inviting outdoor spaces.
description: A two-story stone house with a flat roof, surrounded by a white picket fence, lush trees, and flowering bushes. The front features an arched doorway with ivy and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping with a winding path and picket fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gabled extension, additional windows, and dense tree coverage along the fence line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, back windows, and a clearer view of the garden and fence layout.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the house nestled among trees and the continuation of the garden and fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, scattered on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with climbing ivy, stone steps, and a small overhang
